securityMiddlewares.name: trust-propagation
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Taint tracking through agent pipeline; blocks high-risk tools when context is tainted by untrusted external content (e.g. web pages cannot directly trigger shell calls)

securityMiddlewares.name: content-injection-filter
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Sanitizes HTML and scans web_fetch/web_search output for prompt injection patterns before content enters agent context window

securityMiddlewares.name: tool-contract-enforcement
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Validates tool call arguments against contracts; catches dangerous argument patterns early

securityMiddlewares.name: tool-sequence-detector
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Detects suspicious tool call sequences using trust-aware pattern matching

securityMiddlewares.name: egress-monitor
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Monitors shell/process_spawn commands for exfiltration patterns (base64-pipe-to-curl, reverse shells, DNS exfiltration, webhooks); blocks shell after 3 warnings; enforces domain allowlist for POSTs

securityMiddlewares.name: approval-friction
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Risk-proportional resistance to tool execution; tracks approval velocity; instruments high-risk tools (shell, git_push, agent_kill_switch) with cooling periods when human is rubber-stamping

securityMiddlewares.name: security-scan
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Scans file writes (file_write, file_edit, multi_edit, batch_edit) for credential patterns; warns on git_commit if credentials were detected this session

securityMiddlewares.name: auto-lint
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Automatic lint checks on code writes

securityMiddlewares.name: stop-detection
securityMiddlewares.purpose: Detects premature stopping by the agent

owaspFindings.finding: No execSync or eval usage found in packages/*/src. Shell execution mediated through tool layer with egress-monitor pre-scanning commands before execution. execFileSync used only in vault/backends/op-cli.ts with fixed arguments — no user-controlled input passed directly to subprocess.

content-injection-filter middleware sanitizes all web_fetch/web_search output (strips dangerous HTML, detects injection patterns) before it enters the agent context. trust-propagation middleware prevents tainted context from accessing high-risk tools.

JWT verification in packages/godmode/src/jwt.ts uses timingSafeEqual for signature comparison (prevents timing attacks), enforces exp claim presence, rejects non-HS256 algorithms, requires platform_tenant_id or sub claim. Server logs warning at startup if jwtSecret is empty.
Grep for unsafe HTML injection APIs (innerHTML assignment, React unsafe HTML prop) found zero matches across all packages/*/src TypeScript and TSX files.

owaspFindings.category: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
owaspFindings.finding: console.log calls in packages/cli/src/bin/brainstorm.ts print key names and counts but not key values. No log statements found printing password values, secret values, or token values. pino structured logging used throughout via createLogger().

packages/server/src/server.ts line 113: explicit warn logged if jwtSecret is empty at startup — message references SERVER EXPOSED WITHOUT AUTH. No default passwords found. Debug modes not detected in production paths.

Subagent privilege reduction enforced in packages/core/src/agent/subagent.ts: allowedTools intersected with parent's available tools (privilege ceiling at line ~233). MUTATING_TYPES (code, general) downgraded to read-only without explicit permissionCheck (line ~328-340). PermissionManager class provides auto/confirm/plan modes.
egress-monitor enforces domain allowlist for POST/upload operations. Non-allowlisted domain POSTs blocked. Shell suspended after 3 egress warnings.

vaultSystem.encryption: AES-256-GCM (authenticated encryption with 12-byte random nonce and 16-byte auth tag, atomically written via write-to-temp-then-rename, file mode 0o600)
vaultSystem.kdf: Argon2id (memory=65536 KB, iterations=3, parallelism=4, keyLen=32 — OWASP recommended interactive parameters; @noble/hashes/argon2 implementation; password bytes zeroed after derivation; plaintext key ring zeroed after decrypt/encrypt)
vaultSystem.resolverChain: local encrypted vault (lazy unlock, re-prompts on failure) → 1Password CLI via execFileSync (cached 5 min TTL) → environment variables
vaultSystem.autoLock: 30-minute inactivity timer; derived key and decrypted keys cleared from memory on lock(); derivedKey buffer zeroed on lock
